title: A PETITION FOR A NEW EVANGELION 30
display_title: A PETITION FOR A NEW EVANGELION 30
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] A PETITION FOR A NEW EVANGELION 3.0!! Post by Evangelion3.0hater » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:24 pm [b]now we all hate 3.0. We know that we have been cheated and the creators should remake the movie and follow the original script. Now I ak new but I know good anime. This sucks with a big straw. I am asking for y'alls support to make a petition and send it to benox. P.S. God bless those poor people who were in that explosion in Boston. [/b]

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:25 pm Wow! It's like I'm really on 4chan!

[]: ? Post by Evangelion3.0hater » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:31 pm Hey I am asking yall help. I don't know how 2 set up a petition on here.

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:33 pm 1. Not everyone here hates 3.0. 2. There are countless petition sites for you to use. 3. That last joke was just plain tasteless. At least wait the designated two years before making a joke about a tragic event.

[]: ? Post by Evangelion3.0hater » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:37 pm Wait let me get this straight u 2 likw 3.0?

[]: Post by chee » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:39 pm This is the best thread on the forum right now. Please continue.

[]: :/ Post by Evangelion3.0hater » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:43 pm Wow u ppl r getting a kick outta this ain't yah?

[]: Post by Katana » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:54 pm Not sure if trolling or just very stupid.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:54 pm Lame troll thread.

[]: Post by honsou » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:54 pm Ummm...sure...yeah...

[]: Re: A PETITION FOR A NEW EVANGELION 3.0!! Post by Tarnsman » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:55 pm Evangelion3.0hater wrote: now we all hate 3.0. We know that we have been cheated and the creators should remake the movie and follow the original script.

[]: grrrr Post by Evangelion3.0hater » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:55 pm This isn't a troll. This is for real. Do u ppl care about evangelion? No ok I will be more specific. Most evangelion fans don't like it. I research before I talk. Everywhere j have beem til now evryone had the same opinion. They didn't like it. The movie is confusing, doesn't follow he plot or nothing not even tje trailer. Have any of u ppl taken English class?

[]: Re: grrrr Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Apr 16, 2013 4:59 pm Evangelion3.0hater wrote: This isn't a troll. This is for real.

[]: Post by Evangelion3.0hater » Tue Apr 16, 2013 5:01 pm How do u suppose I do better? From wat I can tell u ppl support the 3.0. I kinda expected angry eva fan when I joined here.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Apr 16, 2013 5:01 pm Why petition it? I haven't even seen it yet. (I've spoiled myself on everything while trying to find out if Kaji died or not. Despite knowing almost the whole movie, I'm still don't know if Kaji's dead. Can anyone say "epic fail?") Also, you can't set up polls or petitions on this forum. The admins were wise in doing this, as it prevents the forum from being responsible for things like this. And, yes. We get a kick out of this. Watching other people be in confusion and/or hatred because of something as pedantic as Evangelion is part of the fun of being an Eva fan. I enjoy watching people like you as a way to wind down after watching the show or any of the movies. (It's kinda like smoking after sex for me.)

[]: Post by Evangelion3.0hater » Tue Apr 16, 2013 5:06 pm Wow u don't even get tye movie yet u like it y? Besides I am not trolling or anything I was just tryin 2 fix a prob that from what I have heard most eva fans besides u losrrs who don't understand composistion thst don't like it. It doesn't follow threw.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Apr 16, 2013 5:12 pm I refuse to believe this isn't a troll. It's too much of a perfect textbook example.

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Apr 16, 2013 5:14 pm Evangelion3.0hater wrote: Besides I am not trolling or anything

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Apr 16, 2013 5:14 pm LOL! This is hilarious! Wait, was it "Don't feed the trolls after midnight"? We probably shouldn't get it wet either. Beyond that, I think it's safe to keep him, right? Quick! Let's ask Mr. Tines if we can keep him!

[]: Post by Evangelion3.0hater » Tue Apr 16, 2013 5:15 pm Ok wat do I do? I and many other ppl don't lkke it. And u can't msay that mu were expectin them 2 change themstory. Cuz we all saw the trailer. M I am askin a serious question. Do yall think the original is better or the fucked up 1?
